title: Dead Simple Bags
description: Dead simple, vanilla survival-friendly, server-sided bags/backpacks.
body:
![Dead Simple Bags Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0af1ecf3c3919d28e7a99d69a1d5d5c3149e3053.png)

Dead Simple Bags adds six simple, vanilla survival-friendly, fully server-sided bags/backpacks. The bags range from 9 to 54 slots (1 to 6 rows) and mostly follow the classic IronChests upgrade progression.

**NOTE:** Bags will not appear in the creative menu unless you install [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) on the client, however everything else will work as expected without it. Bags can still be cheated in with either `/give` or `/polymer creative` as well.

## Bags
